title: docs: Update podman-for-windows.md
body: Remedy for "ssh: rejected" error commonly seen in corporate PC with reduced permissions.

comments.body:
This can help users who face the same problem, so I am glad we added it to the doc (maybe the troubleshooting section would be better, but we can still update it). However, I have a couple of remarks:
- This original problem looks like a bug, and we should track it as such: how can we reproduce it? Does it happen with WSL, Hyper-V, or both? 
- Instead of changing to `--rootful`, switching the `--user-mode-networking` may be enough.
